_comment: Propagation map: L0 (workspace root) → L1 (templates/common/) for scripts/skills/commands; L1 (templates/common/) → L2 (templates/co-*/) for governance docs via marker-inject mode. Agents are intentionally excluded from L0→L1 propagation — only pm.md uses an explicit extends chain (ADR-0039, ADR-0040). Specialist agents are variant-defined (ADR-0043).

scripts.note: L0-only scripts excluded — they reference workspace-level files not available in L2 projects

scripts-helpers.note: L0-only helper exclusion is handled by SCRIPTS.md layer column — publish-to-template.ts reads layer before copying

scripts-lib.note: lib/ files have layer: common in SCRIPTS.md and are propagated L0→L1 via publish-to-template.ts

gemini-settings.description: Antigravity CLI settings file — shared items only (mcpServers, hooks.SessionStart, hooks.PostToolUse). Claude-only items excluded per platform_settings.claude_only in common-contract.json.
gemini-settings.note: Never include: CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS, teammateMode, TeammateIdle, TaskCreated, TaskCompleted, permissions — all claude_only per common-contract.json platform_settings

docs.note: Propagates all markdown files from docs/ to templates/common/docs/. Excludes docs/templates/ subdirectory to avoid duplicate templates/ path.

governance-agents.description: L1 AGENTS.md COMMON-AGENTS section injection to all L2 variants (--docs mode only). Source is L1 (post-transformation) not L0.
